leadText: The Stable Mulch (Japanese: ながながこやし Drawn-Out Fertilizer) is a type of item introduced in Generation IV. It is a type of Mulch used to make Berries remain on the plant longer.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] Makes Berries stay on plant for 150% of usual time before dropping off. Generation V onward [ edit | edit source ] The Stable Mulch serves no practical purpose other than to be sold.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt A plant fertilizer spread on soft soil. It extends the time ripened Berries remain on their plants before falling. HG SS A fertilizer to be spread on soft soil. It extends the time ripened Berries remain on their plants before falling. B W B2 W2 A fertilizer to be spread on soft soil in regions where Berries are grown. A maniac will buy it for a high price. X Y A fertilizer to be spread on soft soil in regions where Berries are grown. OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A fertilizer for growing Berries. However, it appears to be unsuitable for the soil in the Hoenn region and has no effect.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.2.1 Generation IV 1.2.2 Generation V onward 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price D P Pt HG SS $ 200 $ 100 B2 W2 $ 400 $ 100 B W X Y OR AS S M US UM N/A $ 100 In Pokémon Black 2 and White 2 , the Stable Mulch can be sold to the mulch maniac in Mistralton City for $ 1000. Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] Makes Berries stay on plant for 150% of usual time before dropping off. Generation V onward [ edit | edit source ] The Stable Mulch serves no practical purpose other than to be sold. However, it appears to be unsuitable for the soil in the Hoenn region and has no effect. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods D P Pt Route 208 ( Berry Master 's house) HG SS Goldenrod Flower Shop (after acquiring the Berry Pots ) B W Trade B2 W2 Hidden Grottoes , Join Avenue ( Flower Shop ), Funfest Missions
